content: The original Self-Refine framework’s single-perspective iterative refinement can be augmented by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives core to modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine that avoids local optima in output refinement. This modified framework retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data, while addressing the common limitation of single-perspective self-feedback getting stuck repeating the same subtle flaws.
